name: Llama 2 70B Chat
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only Transformer with Grouped-Query Attention (GQA)
note: Flagship RLHF chat model fine-tuned on 1M+ human annotations; Meta reported it on par with ChatGPT/PaLM in human helpfulness and safety evaluations.
tpsNote: Q4_K_M weights (~38-41GB) exceed the RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM, forcing CPU offload; no reliably sourced single-GPU 4090 tokens/sec figure was found specifically for this model.
